articles.author: Garrett Downs
articles.title: Trump vows legislative blockade until SAVE America voter-ID bill is passed - CNBC
articles.description: The SAVE America Act is all but certain to fail in the Senate, where Democrats will use the filibuster to sink it.
articles.content: President Donald Trump threatened to withhold his signature from any bill that reaches his desk until Congress passes a controversial election measure known as the SAVE America Act, which would make … [+3313 chars]
